steps.title: Use the volume formula
steps.content: A cylinder's volume is its base area times its height. Here the base area and volume are given, so the height is the missing factor.

steps.title: Solve for height
steps.content: Substitute volume $448$ and base area $28$: $$ 448=28h $$ $$ h=\frac{448}{28} $$ $$ h=16 $$ The answer is A.
